issues.detail: Instructions lack error handling and edge case coverage.

scenarios.name: Configure Material theme with light/dark toggle and tabs
scenarios.rationale: Treatment used theme.palette with default+slate schemes, brightness-7/4 toggle icons, and features like navigation.tabs/navigation.instant from the skill's mkdocs.yml; baseline gave a generic palette without the slate scheme toggle pattern.

scenarios.name: Add multi-language code tabs and deploy to GitHub Pages
scenarios.rationale: Treatment used === "Python" tab syntax with pymdownx.tabbed (alternate_style: true) and mkdocs gh-deploy as documented; baseline used generic code blocks and a manual gh-pages workflow.
